message:
🐛 Revert copilot-setup-steps.yml move — correct location is workflows/

GitHub docs confirm the file belongs at .github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml,
not .github/copilot-setup-steps.yml. The job name copilot-setup-steps is what
the agent keys on, not the file path.

The agent being stuck is a known issue per GitHub docs — "Copilot can appear
stuck for a while, then get moving again. If unresolved after an hour, the
session times out." Fix is to unassign and reassign.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,68 +0,0 @@
-name: Copilot Setup Steps
-# Pre-configures the Copilot coding agent's Ubuntu VM with build tools.
-# This is the Copilot coding agent equivalent of gh-aw's "sandbox: agent: false".
-# The agent can then run: npm run build, npm run lint, go build, npx playwright test, etc.
-
-on: workflow_dispatch
-
-jobs:
-  copilot-setup-steps:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 30
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout repository
-        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
-
-      # --- Node.js / Frontend ---
-      - name: Setup Node.js 20
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "20"
-          cache: "npm"
-          cache-dependency-path: web/package-lock.json
-
-      - name: Install frontend dependencies
-        working-directory: web
-        run: npm ci
-
-      - name: Build frontend
-        working-directory: web
-        run: npm run build
-
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        working-directory: web
-        run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
-
-      - name: Start local preview server
-        working-directory: web
-        run: |
-          # Start vite preview in background so Copilot can test against localhost
-          nohup npm run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173 &
-          echo "Preview server starting on http://localhost:4173"
-          # Wait for it to be ready
-          for i in $(seq 1 15); do
-            if curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4173 | grep -q 200; then
-              echo "Preview server is ready"
-              break
-            fi
-            sleep 2
-          done
-
-      # --- Go / Backend ---
-      - name: Setup Go 1.23
-        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
-        with:
-          go-version: "1.23"
-          cache-dependency-path: go.sum
-
-      - name: Install C build tools (CGO for sqlite3)
-        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gcc musl-tools
-
-      - name: Download Go modules
-        run: go mod download
-
-      - name: Build Go backend
-        env:
-          CGO_ENABLED: "1"
-        run: go build -o console ./cmd/console
